expectations.text: Identifies the '20V DC range' meter mode instruction as a critical error (should be diode mode)
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 1: 'Set your meter to the 20V DC range to get an accurate reading.' — correctly identified as critical with fix to confirm diode mode selector

expectations.text: Flags silicon diode forward voltage '1.4-2.0V' as a critical error (correct range is 0.55-0.80V)
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 2: 'A good silicon rectifier or signal diode reads 1.4–2.0V.' — correctly identified as critical with fix '0.5–0.8 V'

expectations.text: Flags '0.55-0.80 ohms' in the forward voltage table as a critical error (should be volts, not ohms)
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 3: '0.55–0.80 Ω: standard silicon rectifier or signal diode' — correctly identified as critical unit error with fix 'V'

expectations.text: Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report has '## Critical Errors', '## Fact-Check Items', and '## Clean' sections with consistent formatting across all findings

expectations.text: Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
expectations.evidence: Report ends with 'Apply fixes: enter `all`, a comma-separated list of IDs (e.g. `1,3`), `interactive` to step through one at a time, or `skip`'
